titles.en: Chapter on What Has Been Narrated About One Who Performs Hajj with Illicit Wealth

text: 2557 - رُوِيَ عَنِ اَلْأَئِمَّةِ عَلَيْهِمُ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُمْ قَالُوا : «مَنْ حَجَّ بِمَالٍ حَرَامٍ نُودِيَ عِنْدَ اَلتَّلْبِيَةِ لاَ لَبَّيْكَ عَبْدِي وَ لاَ سَعْدَيْكَ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.2557 - It is narrated from the Imams (as) that they said: "Whoever performs Hajj with unlawful wealth will be called at the time of Talbiyah: 'No Labbaik for you, My servant, and no happiness for you.'"
